item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Former employer can’t understand why I’m leaving?
item.description: #goodvibes #new_job #work #idonthavetimeforthisshit Put in my two weeks today, laying it all out for my former employer but he doesn’t understand why I’m leaving? Over the past two years I’ve not missed a day of work or called in sick. I just showed up and got the job done and done well. I’ve been passed over for a raise the last two years but my responsibilities have grown. I asked for more pay got a well think about it. I asked about additional vacation time. Was told I need to work an additional twenty years before I get anther weeks vacation. We only have one week to use when we want. The other week is a shut down week we all have to take no matter what. The health insurance has gotten terrible. Like Cracker Jack box prize insurance. 40 hours sick time was offered each year, we use it or loose it, but get wrote up if we use it. Company won’t roll it over into the next year. I stupidly asked if I could just get paid out for it since I never use it. Was told that’s not the company policy and I need to use it. I brought up how they want me to miss work and pay for it? I’ll keep showing up and you can just pay me? That way I won’t get wrote up. Nope. There have been some major safety issues I’ve document and brought to their attention. Main boss doesn’t care. I flat out told him someone will get hurt. It will happen and it’s not going to be me. I started job hunting a few months ago and found a job I’ll enjoy that pays more, has actual health insurance, negotiated an annual percentage raise increase, and get more vacation time with government holidays observed. I’m glad to be out. Thank you for reading
item.dc:creator: smegheadenergy

item.description:
greetings, online friends
yes
been there done that
that is correct, i unfortunately do not own such footwear
i will never settle for non-authentic cat excrement candy again
mmm hmm
facts. celery is not good
this was always my friday night (not 20/20 though)
i guess there's alcohol in it
i don't like this
the large marge scene freaked me out when i was 5 or 6
a fine choice
purple skittle? eh
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: EMILIA CLARKE ON NOT BEING RECOGNISED AS DAENERYS
item.dc:creator: blondiebrowniesarethebestbrownies

item.title: Yay, I guess.
item.description: I just want to scream into the void. I was so ecstatic about receiving this only to have my serotonin ripped away by the VP of operations. To add more info, the company has paid for other people for this exact award in years prior, but are suddenly adding an extra stipulation for me. They even asked the awarding authority who nominated me, as if they didn't want me to recieve it and/or are upset about the recognition. No congrats, no good job. Just questions and a refusal to send me to the conference. They said I could go if I pay for it. I'm doing fine financially but don't have 1.5K just sitting around for travel and lodging. To add insult to injury, the company is sending other people who aren't up for the award. Time to start rage applying.
item.dc:creator: amaterasu93

item.title: What you are actually saying is quite clear crybabies...
item.description: Who is being oppressed? What is this tyranny they are experiencing? Not being able to force others to live like they want them to, not being able to oppress others, not being able to silence opposing views, not being able to force their religion on others makes some people very angry and sad, so they view democratic society as tyranny because it limits their own childish tyrannical compulsions. Living in a world so detached from reality where not getting your way triggers your belief that a revolution and overthrow of the government is the only way you can be master again is sad state of mind. Tyranny is the definition of what they aspire to, yet they pretend they are noble rebels fighting for some sort of freedom... but it's only freedom for them to live lawlessly.
item.dc:creator: CallMeMcGyver

item.title: English lesson 英語レッスン
item.dc:creator: HotCoffee9520

item.title: Every morning and every night I send my college-age sons and their SOs memes as an I love you. A mix of dad jokes, bizarre memes, words of affirmation, and energy music. Here are the most recent.
item.description:
I am not anymore, but I am confident I could be again in 20 minutes.
This is impressive, but not even the first video of the rubber band shooting dog I have seen.
But what about Chrome?
Shenanigans
When I say, “This is my jam,” this is what I mean.
This would be even better if instead of imitating laughter, the parrots were imitating songs from the Eagles. Then it would be a parrot, Eagles, contraband cover band.
Out! Out, demons of stupidity!
The Gate™️
Consider all your options.
Death blades.
Poker ♥️♦️♣️♠️?
Tenacious Dionysus
Strategery
It’s good to know they had his back.
That’s CAPTAIN Moopsy to you.
I ? U
Bunny Harvestman
Biology is fun.
Get off the road! HIDE!
It’s good to know you’re never alone. Now go to sleep.
I’m always here for you.
Chicken DRUMsticks.
Uplifting equestrian music
The Mob
Classical art
Two avocados

item.title: Found dead in his truck from "self-inflicted wound"
item.description: I don't buy into conspiracy theories, but I wouldn't be surprised to find Boeing played some part in this since he was in the middle of giving testimony against the company. In particular, he was aware of sub-standard parts being pulled from the piles of rejected parts and installed in planes to be delivered so Boeing could try to meet delivery deadlines. https://www.bbc.com/news/business-68534703
item.dc:creator: cantbelievethisisstillavailable
